gcp.datalabeling.projects.operations.lis.description: Lists operations that match the specified filter in the request. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `UNIMPLEMENTED`.

required.description: The name of the operation's parent resource.

can_come_from.note: [tier 1/exact] call gcp.datalabeling.projects.operations.list, iterate response["operations"][], extract item["name"] → fill {operationId}
